---
title: "Blog"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Einblicke, Tutorials und Updates von unserem Team"
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
  feed: true
page-layout: custom
toc: false
site-url: https://chen.ist/de
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">
<div class="m-listing-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Unser <span class="gr">Blog</span></h1>
    <p>Einblicke, Tutorials und Updates von unserem Team</p>
    <div class="blog-lang-switch">
      <a href="/blog.html">EN</a>
      <a href="/ro/blog.html">RO</a>
      <a href="/sv/blogg.html">SV</a>
      <a href="/de/blog.html" class="active">DE</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```

::: {.container}
:::
